flows.notes: populated-anonymous 'Package is live - publicly discoverable in the marketplace' copy HELD + 'Listed' title-case status chip HELD. Platform-admin package cards still render all-caps 'LISTED' chips (not called out in Wave 6 but inconsistent with populated-anonymous); tolerable inconsistency but worth a micro-polish. Anon/tenant-user/tenant-admin/marketplace-visitor all card-layout (not CRUD).

primary-tenant-admin + primary-tenant-user: Invoice #001/#002/#003 + Paid/Failed/Voided title-case + Monthly + 'May 15, 2026' HELD. populated-tenant-admin now shows Step 1 lifecycle card (Plan/Price/Billing period/Next billing date/Payment method all humanized, no invoice chips in that capture). BUT primary-business-partner Partner Invoicing table STILL renders PAID/DUE all-caps chips + raw INV-B-001/PO-2026-0012 IDs (partner role not part of Wave 6 scope but is a consistency gap).

primary-tenant-admin table HELD (Type='Invite-only', tier='Free'/'Premium'/'Standard' title-case). BUT primary-anonymous + primary-tenant-user 'Discover Groups' card list STILL renders tier chips as 'FREE'/'STANDARD'/'PREMIUM' all-caps. Wave 6 fix only applied to admin table, not to public/tenant-user discovery cards. REGRESSION on user-facing views.

primary-tenant-admin Event Moderation table: Status chips 'Pending review' title-case HELD; Organiser column shows 'Acme Events Co'/'Bay Area Meetup Group' humanized (no raw org-001/org-002) HELD. Anon 'Upcoming Events' + tenant-user attendee view + platform-admin cross-tenant ops all semantic.

primary-event-organiser + primary-tenant-admin RSVP table: 'Guest #001'..'#005' + 'Confirmed'/'Waitlisted' title-case + 'Checked in' HELD. BUT primary-tenant-user 'Your attendance' card STILL shows 'CONFIRMED' all-caps chip alongside 'Checked in' title-case - inconsistent + partial regression. tenant-admin refund table also shows raw 'att-002'/'att-005'/'ref-001'/'ref-002' IDs.

active-platform-admin: fields 'Bundle' 'Active version' 'Required flow count' 'Activated at' all humanized HELD. failed-platform-admin: 'Bundle' 'Error code' 'Validated at' humanized HELD. populated-platform-admin: cross-tenant bundle list with title-case 'Active'/'Degraded'/'Failed' chips + humanized bundle names ('Core Platform v2', 'Marketplace Pack', etc.). support read-only view correctly gated.

Full role-gating HELD: anonymous -> 'Advertise on XIIGen' marketing CTA; tenant-user -> 'Ads console is restricted' kiosk; tenant-admin -> 'Your workspace ad spend'; platform-admin -> full cross-tenant Ads platform dashboard with campaigns + metrics + inline bid editing; platform-support similar to platform-admin.

primary-tenant-admin: 'Editorial workflow' dashboard with Drafts/In review/Approved/Scheduled/Published columns + editorial queue (NOT raw debug). Anonymous article reader view, public-marketplace-visitor subscribe flow, platform-admin CMS Oversight panel all render humanized copy. reader-anonymous 404 is an acceptable edge case. raw index collapsed behind admin-debug disclosure.

Card grid layout across all roles (NOT CRUD table with NODES). Role-branched Install CTAs HELD: anon 'Sign in to install', business-partner 'Request install from admin', public-marketplace-visitor 'Sign in to install', tenant-user 'Request install from admin', tenant-admin 'Install' direct button. Humanized package names + tags.

Authenticated roles (platform-support, tenant-admin, tenant-user) all render 'You're already signed in' kiosk with role-appropriate CTA ('Go to admin console' for admin/support, 'Go to dashboard' for tenant-user). Anonymous views render 'Create your account' signup form + pending-anonymous 'Check your inbox' verification kiosk. All V-R14 BLOCKs HELD.

persistent_blockers_if_any.issue: Tier chips 'FREE'/'STANDARD'/'PREMIUM' still render all-caps on primary-anonymous + primary-tenant-user 'Discover Groups' card list. Wave 6 fix was only applied to the admin table view, not to the public/tenant-user discovery cards.

primary-tenant-user 'Your attendance' card still shows 'CONFIRMED' all-caps chip alongside title-case 'Checked in'. Tenant-admin role has humanized chips but tenant-user user-facing attendee card was missed.
Platform-admin package cards render 'LISTED' all-caps status chips (inconsistent with title-case 'Listed' on populated-anonymous hero). Cosmetic inconsistency; not in Wave 6 scope but visible.

primary-business-partner Partner Invoicing table still uses all-caps 'PAID'/'DUE' chips + raw 'INV-B-001'/'PO-2026-0012' IDs. Partner role not part of Wave 6 scope but inconsistent with tenant-user/tenant-admin invoice styling.
